summary: Iteration 3 — Tested 6 items: auto-detect bug fix, xlsx export, drag-and-drop, high-unmatched banner, rebrand, regression. Backend 14/14 PASS (incl. new test_export_xlsx). Frontend: 5/6 features working, BUT the primary user-reported bug (auto-detect on CSV text change) is NOT FIXED — the debounced useEffect described in the review request is entirely missing from NewAllocation.jsx.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Auto-detect on CSV change NOT IMPLEMENTED. The review request says a debounced useEffect should watch bankCsv/invCsv and auto-fill mapping selects. In /app/frontend/src/pages/NewAllocation.jsx useEffect is imported but NEVER USED — detectHeaders only runs when the user clicks the 'Auto-detect' button. Reproduced: pasted invoice sample on step 3, waited 1500ms, all five required map-* selects (map-bank_reference, map-bank_amount, map-invoice_number, map-invoice_debtor, map-invoice_amount) remained empty (value=''). The previously reported user complaint 'column mapping at the bottom does nothing' is therefore still present unless the user notices and clicks the small grey 'Auto-detect' button. Headers preview ('HEADERS: InvoiceNumber, Debtor, Amount, Date') does render, confirming the textarea state updates — only the auto-trigger is missing.

critical_code_review_comments: NewAllocation.jsx line 1 imports useEffect but never uses it — likely vestige of a removed/incomplete fix. ESLint with eslint-plugin-react-hooks would flag unused imports.

detectHeaders state setter for `loading` is shared with `validate()` and `submit()` — concurrent invocations possible if auto-detect fires while user clicks Continue; consider a dedicated `detecting` flag.

NewAllocation.jsx: SAMPLE_BANK and SAMPLE_INV constants are 6KB of hardcoded text inside a 354-line page file. Consider moving to /app/frontend/src/data/samples.js for reuse and to keep page <300 lines.

AllocationDetail.jsx UnmatchedSplit: drag handlers re-use single `dragSource` state at the parent — works, but moving DnD state into UnmatchedSplit (or using a small reducer) would avoid prop-drilling.

AllocationDetail.jsx is now 451 lines with 5 sub-components; close to the 700-line file-size guideline but consider splitting BankTable / InvoiceTable / AuditTable / ManualLinkDialog / UnmatchedSplit into separate files before adding more features.
seed_data_creation: Re-used iteration_2 run 'TEST_Run_116995.187' for AllocationDetail verification; no new runs created this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VERIFIED PASSES this iteration: (1) Backend export-xlsx returns 6KB+ xlsx with PK magic header and openxml content-type — test_export_xlsx PASS. (2) Export Excel button visible on AllocationDetail (data-testid='export-xlsx'), href = {API_BASE}/allocations/{id}/export-xlsx. (3) Drag-and-drop fully functional: programmatic Playwright drag_and_drop from dnd-bank-{id} onto dnd-invoice-{id} opened ManualLinkDialog with bank/invoice/amount=75.00 prefilled. Individual rows have draggable=true; GripVertical handles render. (4) High-unmatched banner correctly hidden when rate<30% (1/5=20%); banner code path verified by reading source (>=30% trigger). Could not exercise the >=30% path with current seed data; main agent can verify by creating a run with mostly unmatched bank rows. (5) Rebrand verified: page title 'EB Receivables Reconciliation Platform', sidebar 'Receivables Reconciliation / EB BUSINESS SOLUTIONS', no 'Cash Allocator' references. Landing/SignIn/SignUp also rebranded. (6) Regression PASS: login, dashboard, wizard end-to-end (when Auto-detect button clicked), AllocationDetail tabs, Export CSV, Manual Link, Compare, Debtors, Audit, Sign out all working from iteration_2. FAILING: auto-detect on CSV change (see action_items).
rca of the issue: Root cause: The fix described in the review request (useEffect with 400ms debounce watching bankCsv/invCsv) was never written to /app/frontend/src/pages/NewAllocation.jsx. The file imports `useEffect` on line 1 but the component body (lines 36-94) contains zero useEffect calls. The only auto-detect path is the manual button onClick at line 165. Reproduction: 1) login, 2) /allocations/new, 3) fill name+period→Next, 4) click bank-csv-sample→Next, 5) click invoice-csv-sample, 6) wait 2s, 7) inspect [data-testid='map-invoice_number'].value → empty string. Mitigation: add useEffect with setTimeout/clearTimeout debouncing (snippet in action_items).
